ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the vehicle */,
  "odometer" INTEGER /* Odometer reading of the vehicle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vehicle */,
  "is_imported" TEXT /* Indicates if the vehicle is imported or not */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine type of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "fuel" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "paint" TEXT /* Paint color of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target sale price for the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provided the vehicle */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was imported */,
  "vehicle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "additional_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle (e.g., sunroof, leather seats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle the customer is interested in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the vehicle */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., local, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_trim_levels" (
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle trim level */,
  "trim_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle trim level */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle trim level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_trim_levels_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle option */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_option_vehicle" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "option_id")
)
column_names: Indicates if the vehicle is imported or not
